title: January 23
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}
'''January 23''' is the 23rd day of the year. 342 days (343 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1939|1939]] – [[Greg Hildebrandt|Greg]] and [[Tim Hildebrandt]] are born.
*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[Ann Sachs]] is born.
*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Klaus Janson]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[David Rabbitte]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 22|''Star Wars'' (1977) 22]] published.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 100|''Star Wars Weekly'' 100]] published.
*[[1981]] – [[Julia Jones]] is born.
*1981 – [[Pepe Larraz]] is born.
*[[1993]] – ''[[The Star Wars Trilogy]]'' reprinted in mass market paperback format.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 38|''Star Wars'' (1998) 38]] released.
*2002 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 4|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 4]] published.
*2003 – ''[[High Alert!]]'' roleplaying mini-adventure published by [[Wizards of the Coast]].
*[[2007]] – The five finalists of the [[Darth Who Contest]] are revealed.
*[[2009]] – "[[Defenders of Peace]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars: Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead]]'' trade paperback published.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 60|''Star Wars'' (2015) 60]] published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars Battlefront II]]'' [[Dooku|Count Dooku]] update released.
*[[2021]] – [[Trisha Noble]] dies.
*[[2024]] – [[The Courtship of Princess Leia (unabridged audiobook)|''The Courtship of Princess Leia'' unabridged audiobook]] released as part of ''[[The Essential Legends Collection]]''.
*2024 – [[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)|''Yoda: Dark Rendezvous'' unabridged audiobook]] released as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
<noinclude>
